trails.name: Mount Hikurangi - Te Ara ki Hikurangi
trails.description: Visit the sacred mountain of Ngāti Porou, the highest non-volcanic mountain in the North Island. You need backcountry experience to walk up Hikurangi Maunga track.

trails.name: Te Ara ki Hikurangi Walkway (Summit Route)
trails.description: Te Ara ki Hikurangi track crosses private farmland - leave gates as you find them and don't disturb stock.Contact Te Runanganui o Ngati Porou before you start: phone: +64 6 864 9004, email: Hikurangihutt@tronp.org.nz or info@tronp.org.nz
